steps.title: Set up the interval
steps.content: The estimate is $9.2\%$ and the margin of error is $1.84\%$. A plausible interval extends one margin of error below and above the estimate.

steps.title: Calculate the bounds
steps.content: Lower bound: $$9.2-1.84=7.36.$$ Upper bound: $$9.2+1.84=11.04.$$ So the plausible range is from $7.36\%$ to $11.04\%$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer states that it is plausible that between $7.36\%$ and $11.04\%$ of the items are defective, so B is correct.
